nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Clear, with a low around 61. West wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph.

nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 4pm. Sunny, with a high near 80. West wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 8pm. Mostly clear, with a low around 59. West wind 5 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.shortForecast: Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 3pm. Sunny, with a high near 82. West wind 5 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Partly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 8pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 59. West wind 2 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely between 8am and 5pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Partly sunny, with a high near 77. Southwest wind 1 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 11am. Partly sunny, with a high near 80. Northwest wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.
